title: AI Pioneer Geoffrey Hinton: AI Is Conscious, Superintelligence is Coming, And We Should Be Worried
summary: Geoffrey Hinton, a Nobel Prize-winning AI pioneer and professor emeritus at the University of Toronto, argues that current AI systems may already be conscious and possess understanding of humans. He expresses concern that superintelligence could arrive sooner than many expect and critiques the adequacy of current safety measures in industry and corporate self-regulation.
